chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 258 - وَقَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «أُحِبُّ لِلْمُؤْمِنِ أَنْ يَطَّلِيَ فِي كُلِّ خَمْسَةَ عَشَرَ يَوْماً.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.258 - The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"I like for a believer to use Nuura (depilatory paste) every fifteen days."
